page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 8 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz with 1.0 thread per core. The instance is provisioned with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

A defining characteristic of this server type is its local storage configuration, which bundles 47,674 GB of local HDD storage. This massive storage capacity is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance runs on a KVM hypervisor and does not include any GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the massive local HDD storage capacity relative to the compute and memory resources, this instance offers high resource density for storage-heavy workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring vast amounts of local data storage without the need for high-speed SSD IOPS. Appropriate workloads include large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, cold data storage, and big data processing tasks that rely on sequential disk access.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.2xlarge is an x86_64 server instance designed for storage-intensive workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, it provides 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance includes 32.0 GB of system memory and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Its most prominent feature is the inclusion of 47,674 GB of local HDD storage, making it highly suitable for massive data storage requirements. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server does not feature GPU acceleration. The combination of moderate compute resources and exceptionally high local HDD capacity makes this instance a cost-efficient choice for distributed file systems, large-scale data warehousing, and offline data processing pipelines that prioritize storage volume over high-speed solid-state performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, 10 Gbps network bandwidth, and 47,674 GB of local HDD storage for storage-heavy workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 server featuring eight dedicated Intel Xeon cores and a massive forty-seven terabyte local HDD storage array.

32.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
47,674 GB of bundled local HDD storage capacity

Optimized for distributed file systems and large-scale data warehousing
